name: Reversed Path Search - Single Collection
summary: Single-collection reversed path search strategy for openEHR compositions.
description: Stores compositions with reversed paths in a single collection; uses Atlas Search when available.

benefits: Simpler deployment with a single collection
Supports reversed paths with optional Atlas Search
constraints: Relies on reversed path indexing within one collection

cards.title: Querying
cards.body: Uses a single collection with reversed paths; $match or $search depending on scope.
